content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.76% with VIX +2.35% to 18.73 — risk-off tone with broad weakness across Banking, Realty, Auto, Energy. However IT and select pockets (Pharma, Metals, Defence, Adani complex, Telecom infra) are outperforming on idiosyncratic catalysts. Crude/INR pressure and FII outflows support defensive posture; book is already well-positioned with ADANIPORTS, HAL, PNBHOUSING running, so priority is trailing SLs on winners rather than stacking new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.3%, but SL at 1029 sits 2.0% below CMP 1049.70 — already at the trail-gap floor (1.0%+). Tightening further would invite self-stopout on normal intraday chop. Current SL is fine; emitting MODIFY here only because target/SL fields require restatement — but values unchanged from stored. Actually withdraw — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+6.3% unrealized. Current SL 1029 is 2.0% below CMP 1049.70 — tighter trail would breach 1% trail-gap floor and invite intraday stopout. Q4 results already out (PAT +19% YoY), thesis intact, sector momentum strong with peer Can Fin Homes +31% YoY and LIC HF results May 13 as next sector catalyst. Letting it run toward 1110 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.7%, CMP 121.65 vs SL 119.00 (1.5% buffer). Gold thesis (geopolitical risk premium, INR weakness, central bank buying) intact; physical gold at record Rs 1.54 lakh/10g but ETF lagging on profit-taking after Akshaya Tritiya peak. SL still has room; thesis not broken. Hold to SL or recovery toward 125."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Current SL 1710 = breakeven+0.6% on entry 1700, CMP 1739.50 — gap is only 1.7% (fine, above 1% floor). Stock hit ATH 1748.80 today on Q4 beat (rev +26%, PAT 3308 cr, cargo 500 MMT) and group-wide rally. SL already at breakeven, which satisfies trail mandate (a). Holding SL/target unchanged but explicitly noting — actually no-op MODIFY violates discipline. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.6%. SL 1710 sits at breakeven+0.6% (already trailed to BE), gap to CMP 1739.50 is 1.7% — above 1% floor, no further tightening warranted given today's volatility (intraday range 1719-1757). Q4 beat confirmed, June 12 dividend record date is supportive, broker upgrades ongoing. Let it run toward 1820."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.7%, CMP 13435 vs SL 13400 (0.3% buffer — tight). Fundamentals strong (April record 239,646 units +33% YoY, FY26 record 2.42mn vehicles) but Q4 PAT -6.9% YoY on bond MTM and stock fading. Today made low 13360 already touched SL zone. Thesis intact; tight SL will execute itself if break. No exit/MODIFY — letting market resolve."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.0%, CMP 204.95 vs SL 204.00 (0.5% buffer — at risk). Q4 was strong (PAT +68% YoY, GNPA -140bps to 3.27%, dividend Rs 1.50). Stock recovered intraday from low 204.21 — bullish reversal off support. SL is tight enough that one more downtick stops it; not loosening SL (forbidden) and not exiting prematurely. Let market decide."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "new_target": 4900.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Current SL = entry 4575 (breakeven), CMP 4640.50 — gap 1.4%, above 1% floor. P&L +1.4% just below the 2% trail-to-breakeven trigger; SL already at BE so no action required. No-op MODIFY — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.4%, SL already at breakeven 4575 (1.4% buffer to CMP 4640.50, above 1% floor). Defence thesis strong: order book Rs 2.54 lakh cr, new CMP from May 1 with Tejas/Prachand track record, JM target 4875. Today's +6.95% move is volume-light (0.7x) so being patient on trail. Let it test 4700-4750 before tightening further."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at 2.0% below CMP — at trail-gap floor. Tighter trail would self-stop on normal chop."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "1.5% buffer to SL, gold macro thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed to BE+0.6%; 1.7% gap to CMP appropriate given today's volatility."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 13400.00,
      "reasoning": "Tight 0.3% buffer; SL will resolve itself. Cannot loosen."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 204.00,
      "reasoning": "Tight buffer; intraday reversal off SL zone is constructive. Cannot loosen."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven; +6.95% rally on light volume — let it consolidate before tightening."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Strong setups today but cluster/correlation discipline applies: ADANIPORTS already held in Adani complex — NOT adding ADANIGREEN despite breakout (cluster cap). HFCL +12% on Q4 turnaround and $1.1bn order is best-in-class telecom infra play but stock at 52w high after 8.6% spike — wait for pullback to 122-124 zone. CEMPRO +15.6% on Adani-group E&C is parabolic (+41% in days) — late entry chases the tail; Adani-cluster also constraining. HAL already held captures defence theme; not adding BHEL. MOTILALOFS Q4 net loss (MTM) gives muddy headline — pass. WOCKPHARMA promoter pledge + ASM4 surveillance overhang (governance leg) — NO_ACTION per rule 13. MANAPPURAM has CEO on extended medical leave + Bain transition flux — NO_ACTION. LALPATHLAB/TATATECH/VEDL/SOBHA/LAURUSLABS not adding given crowded book and CAUTIOUS macro. Triggers to revisit: HFCL pullback to 122 with hold, BANKBEES on PSU bank capitulation, GOLDBEES add on dip below 120 if VIX spikes further.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 34% deployed with 6 CNC positions across diverse themes (Housing finance, Gold, Ports, Auto, Banking, Defence) — well-spread, no cluster issues. Two clear winners (PNBHOUSING +6.3%, ADANIPORTS +1.6% with HAL +1.4%) and three at/near SL (MARUTI, BANDHANBNK, GOLDBEES). Today's tick is appropriately a 'trail and watch' tick rather than 'add' — VIX +2.35% with Nifty -0.76% on FII outflow is not an accumulation tape. Daily P&L +0.35%, well within risk budget. No new entries today: the watchlist is hot but each name carries either an overhang (governance), crowded entry (CEMPRO/HFCL extended), or cluster conflict (Adani names, defence). Discipline > activity. Re-assess at 1pm if pullbacks emerge."
}
